globaltick.xyz

Newsletter & Privacy

Weekly planning notes for global holidays, retail dates, sports, entertainment and tech events. The static form validates email, stores your preference locally and opens a subscription email request.

⌕
GGlobal events · holidays · countdown intelligence

Weekly planning notes for global holidays, retail dates, sports, entertainment and tech events. The static form validates email, stores your preference locally and opens a subscription email request.

Privacy Policy

GlobalTick is a static website. It uses local browser storage for language and newsletter preferences, Google Analytics for aggregate traffic measurement, and does not sell personal data.

GlobalTick

Public holiday data is seeded from Nager.Date-style fields and enriched with OpenHolidays, Wikidata and curated public event references.
